ConfigProfile.description: A named profile grouping channel groups, with an optional default stream profile

streamProfile.description: Default stream profile applied to every channel in this profile

orderStreamsBy.description: Default stream ordering applied to every channel in this profile

ConfigGroup.description: A channel group that maps to a Dispatcharr ChannelGroup

streamProfile.description: Stream profile override for this group (overrides profile-level setting)

orderStreamsBy.description: Stream ordering override for this group (overrides profile-level setting)

ConfigMember.description: A channel member with sequential matcher, transformer, and validator rules

matchers.description: Ordered matchers used to filter input streams

transformers.description: Ordered transformers applied to matched streams

validators.description: Post-transformation validators that assert conditions on transformed streams, assembled channels, or member output depending on validator type and scope; violations are logged as warnings or raise a failure before any database write

streamProfile.description: Stream profile override for this member's channels (overrides group- and profile-level settings)

orderStreamsBy.description: Stream ordering override for this member's channels (overrides group- and profile-level settings)

ConfigMatcher.description: A filter rule evaluated against each input stream; matchers run in order and can keep or drop streams

action.description: Whether matched streams are kept or dropped

pattern.description: Regex pattern to test against the target field (type: regex)

prefixes.description: One or more prefixes; the stream matches if its field starts with any of them (type: hasPrefix)

substrings.description: One or more substrings; the stream matches if its field contains any of them (type: containsAny)

values.description: Exact values; the stream matches if its field equals any of them (type: exactMatch)

transformers.description: Transformers applied to the field value before this matcher evaluates; useful for canonicalising the value before matching

ConfigTransformer.description: A mutation rule applied to a stream field value or explicit metadata fields; transformers run in order after all matchers pass

outputType.description: Target format for cardinal numbers — 'number' (e.g. 1) or 'word' (e.g. ONE) (type: convertCardinalNumbers)

value.description: Static value to assign to the field (type: set). Use as a low-level escape hatch for unusual requirements

logoUrl.description: Logo URL value to assign (type: setMetadata)

tvgId.description: TVG ID value to assign (type: setMetadata)

ConfigValidator.description: A post-transformation assertion applied to transformed streams, or for count validators to assembled channels/member output; violations are surfaced as warnings or halt execution as failures

action.description: Response when the assertion is violated — 'warn' logs a warning; 'fail' logs an error and stops execution before any database write

operator.description: Comparison operator applied to the stream count (type: count); one of: gt, gte, lt, lte, eq, neq

value.description: Integer to compare the stream count against (type: count)

pattern.description: Regular expression the field value must match (type: regexMatch)

scope.description: Validator scope override. count defaults to 'member': 'member' counts channels produced by the member after matching, transformation, and merging, while 'channel' counts streams inside each assembled channel. regexMatch and nonEmpty default to 'stream' and may also use 'channel' to validate assembled channel fields after merging.

field.description: Field to evaluate (type: regexMatch, nonEmpty); e.g. 'name', 'tvg_id', 'logo_url'. For channel-scoped validation, 'tvg_id' maps to the assembled channel's epg_id field.
